item.title: Python Patterns
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)
item.description: Website Brandon Rhodes, evolving guide to design patterns in the Python programming language. The site allows him to collect his ideas about Python and Design Patterns all in one place.

item.title: Refactoring Guru
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)
item.description: Website Provides high-level and implementation guides for common design patterns and refactoring.
